texts.label: text
texts.orig: Do not subject the system to excessive shock and vibration.
texts.text: Do not subject the system to excessive shock and vibration.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Do not place excessive weight on flat surfaces or drawers. ·
texts.text: Do not place excessive weight on flat surfaces or drawers. ·

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Maintain system balance. When using rails or dovetails, distribute equipment on each side of the system. Uneven system balance could cause the system to tip.
texts.text: Maintain system balance. When using rails or dovetails, distribute equipment on each side of the system. Uneven system balance could cause the system to tip.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Nominally configured mass for trolley machine includes trolley, breathing system, three pipeline inlets, two PIN index yokes, passive AGSS, AC outlet with transformer, drawers, two pivot display arm, top shelf patient monitoring mount, and central brake. Does not include drawer contents or externally mounted accessories.
texts.text: Nominally configured mass for trolley machine includes trolley, breathing system, three pipeline inlets, two PIN index yokes, passive AGSS, AC outlet with transformer, drawers, two pivot display arm, top shelf patient monitoring mount, and central brake. Does not include drawer contents or externally mounted accessories.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Nominally configured mass for pendant and wall mount machine includes breathing system, three pipeline inlets, passive AGSS, drawers, two pivot display arm, and top shelf patient monitoring mount. Does not include drawer contents and externally mounted accessories.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The dovetail on the left side of the machine is separated into upper and lower load ratings. Maximum allowable upper dovetail loading is 4.5 kg and 3.7 Nm. Maximum allowable lower dovetail loading is 6 kg and 10 Nm.
texts.text: The dovetail on the left side of the machine is separated into upper and lower load ratings. Maximum allowable upper dovetail loading is 4.5 kg and 3.7 Nm. Maximum allowable lower dovetail loading is 6 kg and 10 Nm.

texts.label: caption
texts.orig: Figure 1-10 · The upper dovetail load in kg (vertical) versus load distance from the upper dovetail in cm (horizontal).
texts.text: Figure 1-10 · The upper dovetail load in kg (vertical) versus load distance from the upper dovetail in cm (horizontal).

description.text:
PURPOSE: This image shows the relationship between the upper dovetail load in kg and the load distance from the upper dovetail in cm, indicating the permissible loading limits.
COMPONENTS: AC 24.289
VALUES: Upper dovetail load (vertical axis): 0-5 kg, with the curve originating at 4.5 kg. Load distance from upper dovetail (horizontal axis): 5-35 cm, with the curve extending to approximately 30 cm.
DESCRIPTION: The graph illustrates the permissible upper dovetail loading limits for the system. The vertical axis represents the upper dovetail load in kg, while the horizontal axis indicates the load distance from the upper dovetail in cm. The shaded area beneath the curve denotes the allowed load-distance combinations, showing that the maximum allowable load, starting at 4.5 kg, decreases as the distance from the dovetail increases.

table_cells.text: -25 to 60°C Oxygen cell storage is -15 to 50°C, 10 to 95% RH, 500 to 800 mmHg LCD display storage is -20 to 60°C
